Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive early. Your tumble and silver bolts scale. Play around your range.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — tumble backwards to create distance and avoid.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Kite with tumble and autos. Don't extend into his bleed.
Darius.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. His ult is deadly — maintain distance always.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through tumble kiting and silver bolts. He struggles if you kite.
Darius.win_condition: Kite with tumble and autos. Scale into silver bolts. Avoid his bleed.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through silver bolts and kiting.
Darius.positioning: Kite with tumble. Keep distance from bleed. Never commit to him.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence stops your tumble. His Judgment dominates close. Maintain distance with autos.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — tumble away before he closes. Create distance.
Garen.early_game: Garen dominates close fights. Trade with autos from range. Tumble to kite.
Garen.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance always.
Garen.late_game: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts. He struggles if spaced.
Garen.win_condition: Trade autos from range. Tumble to kite. Scale into silver bolts.
Garen.scaling: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts.
Garen.positioning: Trade autos from range. Tumble to kite. Never let him close.

Fiora.early_game: Fiora dominates early through parry. Kite with tumble and autos.
Fiora.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. Her split push is strong. Avoid dueling her.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts. Fiora struggles if spaced.
Fiora.win_condition: Kite with tumble and autos. Avoid parry. Scale into silver bolts.
Fiora.scaling: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts.
Fiora.positioning: Tumble defensively. Avoid parry. Never duel her.

Riven.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. Her split push is strong. Teamfight instead.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts. Riven struggles grouped.

Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox Q outranges you. Tumble and kite with autos. Avoid his range.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. His Q still hurts. Maintain distance.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through kiting and silver bolts. He falls off.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your autos and tumble completely zone him. Dominate early.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — tumble away from him. Your kite is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with autos and tumble. Nasus is helpless. Build a massive lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps him. Kite and scale.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through kiting and silver bolts.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with autos and tumble. Build lead. Kite late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through silver bolts.
Nasus.positioning: Trade aggressively early. Kite him late. Use tumble defensively.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion's Q poke is strong. Your autos and tumble are strong. Trade autos carefully.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q slow — tumble sideways to dodge and create distance.
Sion.early_game: Trade autos with tumble kite. His tankiness scales.
Sion.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Sion.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your kiting keeps you relevant.
Sion.win_condition: Trade autos with tumble kite. Scale into silver bolts. Maintain distance.
Sion.positioning: Trade autos with tumble. Avoid his Q. Maintain distance.

Malphite.mid_game: Your silver bolts scale. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance.
Malphite.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your kiting helps.

Malphite.positioning: Trade autos with tumble. Avoid E. Maintain distance.

Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your silver bolts scale. Trade carefully.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through kiting and silver bolts.

Kayle.scaling: Even — both scale well late game.
Kayle.positioning: Trade autos early. Kite late. Use tumble defensively.
